# Jobly

> Distributed job processing, message queue, and in-memory mediator library for .NET 10. Three patterns, one unified pipeline, a real-time dashboard.

Jobly ships as three NuGet packages: Moberg.Jobly.Core (publishing), Moberg.Jobly.Worker (processing), and Moberg.Jobly.UI (dashboard). Supports PostgreSQL and SQL Server. Uses the transactional outbox pattern — jobs are committed atomically with your business data.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/getting-started): Installation, DbContext setup, service registration, first handler
- [Messages](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/patterns/messages): Pub/sub IMessage with multiple handlers, fan-out routing
- [Jobs](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/patterns/jobs): IJob with scheduling, retries, continuations, batches, named queues, mutex
- [Requests](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/patterns/requests): In-memory IRequest<TResponse> via IMediator.Send(), no persistence
- [Patterns Overview](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/patterns): Type hierarchy, unified pipeline behaviors
- [Outbox Pattern](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/outbox-pattern): Transactional outbox — jobs committed with business data
- [Crash Recovery](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/crash-recovery): Sliding invisibility timeout, keep-alive, stale job recovery
- [Job Tracing](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/tracing): TraceId and SpawnedByJobId for cross-job flow visibility
- [Job Cancellation](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/cancellation): Graceful CancellationMode, handler CancellationToken
- [Configuration](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/configuration): Worker, polling, retention, dispatcher mode, worker groups
- [Recurring Jobs](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/recurring-jobs): Cron-based scheduling, deduplication, execution history
- [Dashboard Auth](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/dashboard-auth): IJoblyAuthorizationFilter, built-in login, cookie auth
- [Mutex](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/docs/mutex): ConcurrencyKey-based mutual exclusion for jobs

## Optional

- [Full AI Reference](https://moberghr.github.io/jobly/llms-full.txt): Complete self-contained reference with all patterns, API, configuration, and examples
